Restoring History, One Piece at a Time

Expert restoration for Masonic plaques, presentation pieces, and ceremonial paraphernalia

Get Your Free Quote

Our Services

Expert restoration for your most treasured items

Plaque Restoration

We restore metal plaques of all sizes, removing tarnish, repairing damage, and restoring original finishes. From cornerstone plaques to memorial dedications, we bring them back to their former glory.

Presentation Pieces

Gavels, trowels, squares, and compasses—we restore all ceremonial presentation items. Our process preserves engravings while renewing the finish and structural integrity.

Medal & Regalia Restoration

We carefully clean and restore Masonic medals, jewels, and regalia items. Each piece is handled with care to preserve delicate details and historical significance.

Custom Engraving

Add personalized engravings to restored or new items. We match historical fonts and styles or create custom designs for new presentations.

We specialize in the expert restoration of Masonic plaques, presentation pieces, and ceremonial paraphernalia. Our craftspeople honor traditional techniques while bringing new life to your treasured items.
